message:
Consolidate duplicate ChangelogAccordion components

Merged the best features from both implementations:
- From PascalCase: Card wrapper, semantic icons (Sparkles/Wrench/AlertTriangle), colored pill badges
- From kebab-case: framer-motion animations, version sorting (newest first), date formatting, timeline dots, className prop, aria-expanded accessibility, version count badge

Removed the unused changelog-accordion.tsx (kebab-case) duplicate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
